Improve the EVOLVE_TASK prompt to include the user's profile summary from profiler.get_profile_summary() so the agent evolves toward Jake's actual usage patterns.
Add a 'search_codebase' tool to tools.py that uses grep/ripgrep to search across all source files for a pattern.
Create a notification system: after each evolution cycle, append a summary to data/notifications.jsonl that the dashboard can display as a feed.
Add session persistence to agent.py: save the claude session ID so tasks can be resumed if interrupted.
Improve git_release.py: auto-generate release notes by diffing the current HEAD against the last tag and summarizing changes.
Add a 'benchmark' mode that runs a set of known tasks and measures success rate, duration, and token usage to track performance over time.
Create an 'agent_config.json' file that lets the user configure model, max_tokens, pause_between_cycles, and other settings without editing Python code.
